max_scan_concurrent.description: Maximum number of concurrent scan jobs

ai_enrichment_enabled.description: Enable automatic AI enrichment for new CVEs

ai_enrichment_batch_size.description: Number of CVEs per AI batch-enrich job

smtp_from_address.description: From address for system emails (invitations, alerts)

invitation_expiry_hours.description: User invitation token expiry in hours

finding_report_date_mode.description: How report dates are computed: dynamic (now) | fixed | creation_date

sla_warning_days.description: Days before SLA breach to send warning notification

rate_limit_login_per_minute.description: Max login attempts per IP per minute

cve_fetch_sources.description: Default CVE fetch sources for data-service PopulateDB
